cin7POs.internalComments: HDSN-DT180-OAK and CPA-V3-TV180-WOK in PO-1847B - by Loreto

Split from PO-1847 receiving as HDSN-DT180-OAK and CPA-V3-TV180-WOK going to error when receiving - by Loreto
This is to allow order waiting for the other SKUs are fulfilled
